headlines.title: The Generals Who Are Now Running Iran
headlines.summary: The killing of Ayatollah Ali Khamenei ushered in a new form of collective leadership in the country, with more power for the Revolutionary Guards.

headlines.title: Iran War Live Updates: Trump Says Israel and Lebanon Agree to Extend Cease-Fire
headlines.summary: The president said the truce in Lebanon would last three more weeks. Halting the war between Israel and Iranian-backed Hezbollah in Lebanon has been considered critical to advancing any peace agreement to end the war in Iran.

headlines.title: $106 Billion Loan Reflects E.U.’s View That Peace in Ukraine Is Far Away
headlines.summary: Unlike previous European assistance packages, this one is heavily weighted toward military spending, meant to put Ukraine on solid footing for a long fight.

headlines.title: Touring Africa, Pope Leo Raised His Voice, but Didn’t Like the Echo
headlines.summary: On his recent trip abroad, Leo XIV made some of his most forthright comments since becoming pope last year, but grew uncomfortable at how that criticism was interpreted.

headlines.title: Afghans Who Helped U.S. Forces Say They’re Being Pushed Back to the Taliban
headlines.summary: Once promised a move to the United States, Afghan refugees who helped U.S. forces say they face ‘bad or worse’ options: resettlement to Congo or returning home to live under the Taliban.

headlines.title: Lebanon truce extended; Trump says ‘clock is ticking’ for Iran to make deal
US professors sue university over arrest during pro-Palestine protest
Milei administration in Argentina blocks journalist access to Casa Rosada
EU formally approves 90bn euro Ukraine loan and new sanctions on Russia
Pope decries migrants and refugees being treated ‘worse than house pets’
U.S. soldier charged with using classified information to bet on Maduro's removal
headlines.summary: It's the first time suspected insider trading on Polymarket has led to criminal charges in the U.S.

headlines.title: French police probe suspected weather device tampering after odd Polymarket bet
headlines.summary: The incident is the latest eyebrow-raising bet on Polymarket, as allegations of rigging and manipulation continue to haunt the popular prediction market site.

headlines.title: The FDA gives the green light to the first gene therapy for deafness
headlines.summary: The treatment, developed by Regeneron Pharmaceuticals, is for a very rare form of deafness. But it represents a medical milestone.

headlines.title: Meta will lay off 10% of its staff
headlines.summary: The cuts follow losses in two pivotal court cases and the company's push to invest in artificial intelligence.

headlines.title: Airlines in Europe slash thousands of flights as Iran war cuts jet fuel supplies
headlines.summary: The soaring cost of jet fuel is forcing European airlines to cancel tens of thousands of flights, while energy authorities warned of a possible jet fuel shortage if supplies aren't replenished soon.

headlines.title: EU leaders to address Iran war fallout, mutual defense at Cyprus summit
headlines.summary: AYIA NAPA, Cyprus - European Union (EU) leaders gathering in Cyprus on Thursday and Friday will discuss the economic and security fallout from Iran war, especially on soaring energy prices and mutual defense following a recent drone attack on the Mediterranean island.

headlines.title: SE. Asia seeks domestic fuels amid energy crunch
headlines.summary: Southeast Asian countries are leaning harder on homegrown energy sources — from coal to palm oil and sugarcane — as soaring costs and supply risks make Middle Eastern oil and gas imports less viable.

headlines.title: Red Cross envoy applauds Beijing's humanitarian action
headlines.summary: Balthasar Staehelin, personal envoy of the International Committee of the Red Cross president to China, has lauded China's increasing engagement in international humanitarian action, praising the country's consistent support for respect for international humanitarian law and its diplomatic efforts to promote the peaceful resolution of crises.

headlines.title: Mutual gains via Five-Year Plan welcomed
headlines.summary: China and the US can create a better future for relations, Chinese Ambassador to the United States Xie Feng said on Monday, calling on the nations to seize the opportunities presented by China's 15th Five-Year Plan (2026-30).

headlines.title: Economies to feel war heat across globe
headlines.summary: The war in the Middle East will likely affect the global economy and the United States, whether it continues for a short or long term, because of disruptions in the oil market that could trigger inflation and spur a recession, warn experts, economists and the International Monetary Fund.

headlines.title: Respect all views except Whatsapp University: Supreme Court in Sabarimala case
headlines.summary: Supreme Court emphasises respect for all views but dismisses 'WhatsApp University' during Sabarimala discrimination case hearings.

headlines.title: U.P. govt. apprehends unrest on May 1, Yogi Adityanath tells officials to remain alert
headlines.summary: U.P. Chief Minister Yogi Adityanath warns of potential unrest on Labour Day, urging officials to stay vigilant and prevent disruptions.

headlines.title: ‘Sadbhav Yatra’ has posed political challenge to BJP’s divisive politics, says Congress leader Brijendra Singh
headlines.summary: Congress leader Brijendra Singh claims ‘Sadbhav Yatra’ challenges BJP's divisive politics while reconnecting with grassroots and energizing party workers.

headlines.title: Trump shares right-wing anchor’s rant against Indians, MEA terms it ‘inappropriate’
headlines.summary: Trump's sharing of derogatory remarks about India sparks criticism, with India's MEA calling the comments "inappropriate" and "uninformed."

headlines.title: What Telangana’s survey shows about caste inequality
headlines.summary: Telangana's survey reveals profound caste inequality, showing SC and ST households are structurally marginalized despite economic growth.
